name: hf-bot
description: An open-source terminal developer agent and local sandbox workspace utility for safely validating Hugging Face repositories and automating local terminal workflows.

components.name: hf-bot CLI Client Engine
components.description: Local sandbox interactive session utility equipped with zero-latency streaming architecture, intent-based dynamic tool routing, and human-in-the-loop terminal execution safety gates.

components.name: hf-bot Server Proxy Gateway
components.description: Vercel-hosted FastAPI cloud routing engine coupled with MongoDB telemetry logging and an asynchronous server-side SMTP email sharing framework.

needs.description: Funding global API execution proxies, data persistence layers in MongoDB Atlas, and production server host nodes to scale the public Option A tier configuration.
Engineering advanced execution tools, implementing broader model support matrixes, and optimizing dynamic pre-flight caching layers to keep stream performance high.
Auditing local shell runtime interception processes and strengthening user privacy constraints within the centralized proxy telemetry layers.
